user.title: Olympia Electronics
user.description: Enter your Olympia Electronics account credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Olympia Electronics
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials have expired. Please re-enter them.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Olympia Electronics cloud. Check your network and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.account_mismatch: Those credentials are for a different Olympia Electronics account than the one being re-authenticated.

init.title: Olympia Electronics options
init.description: Adjust the temperature range and step used by your thermostats.

error.min_max: The minimum temperature must be lower than the maximum temperature.
